# Copilot Instructions for Gamatrix

The canonical shared agent guidance for this repository lives in `AGENTS.md`.

Start by reading `AGENTS.md` and treat it as the source of truth for:

- build, test, and lint commands
- high-level architecture and data flow
- repository-specific conventions and patterns

Keep this file thin. Add Copilot-specific notes here only when they cannot live in the shared `AGENTS.md`.
